message:
Update ft-core lib implementation and granular execution tracking

Advanced the ft-core library implementation with new functionality.
Updated the granular execution TODO to reflect current progress and
remaining work items across the frankentorch operator surface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
